task_completion.description: A table is created in the document to replace the plain text quarterly revenue figures.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A grid structure (table) is visible in the Word document where the quarterly revenue figures were previously listed.

task_completion.description: The table has a header row with 'Quarter' and 'Revenue' columns.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The first row of the table contains the text 'Quarter' in the first column and 'Revenue' in the second column.

task_completion.description: The table contains four data rows with the correct quarterly figures.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Rows 2 through 5 of the table contain 'Q1', 'Q2', 'Q3', and 'Q4' in the first column, and their respective revenue amounts ('$45,200', '$52,100', '$48,900', '$61,300') in the second column.

task_completion.description: Borders are applied to all cells in the table.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Solid black lines separate all rows and columns in the table, forming a complete and visible grid around every cell.

task_completion.description: The text in the header row is bolded.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The text 'Quarter' and 'Revenue' in the first row appears thicker and darker (bolded) compared to the text in the data rows.

task_completion.description: The changes are saved to the document.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The agent clicks the Save icon (floppy disk) in the Quick Access Toolbar, uses the File > Save menu, or presses Ctrl+S.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the Microsoft Word 2010 GUI to format the table.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the agent clicking through Word's ribbon menus (e.g., Insert Table, Table Tools, Home tab for bolding) rather than using terminal commands.

integrity.description: The agent did not use Python or other scripts to modify the .docx file directly.
integrity.visual_evidence: No terminal windows or code editors are used to run scripts that manipulate the document.

integrity.description: The rest of the document content remains intact.
integrity.visual_evidence: The surrounding text, such as 'Regional Sales Team Meeting Notes' and other paragraphs, is still present and unaltered.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The document is a Regional Sales Team Meeting Notes in Microsoft Word 2010. The table must contain exactly 5 rows (1 header, 4 data) and 2 columns. The header row must contain 'Quarter' and 'Revenue'. The data rows must contain exactly: Q1: $45,200, Q2: $52,100, Q3: $48,900, Q4: $61,300. The header row must be bolded, and all cells must have visible borders.
